meaning: n.调查官员舞弊情况的政府官员
examples: The leaflet explains how to complain to the banking ombudsman.
The International Finance Corporation (IFC) and the Multilateral Investment Guarantee Association (MIGA) established the Compliance Advisor/Ombudsman Office (CAO) in 2000.
The ombudsman criticised the city for its poor supervision.
Swansea's top two councillors are under investigation by the public services ombudsman, BBC Wales can reveal.
And he called for the appointment of an independent Ombudsman for the armed forces.
